name: codex-workflows
description: Run Claude Code dynamic-workflow scripts against a local Codex App Server instead of Claude subagents. The workflow DSL (agent/parallel/pipeline/phase/log/budget/args/workflow) is preserved verbatim; only agent() is rebound to a Codex thread+turn.

scripts.test: node test/offline.js && node test/map-run.test.js && node test/view-run.test.js && node test/view-run.live.test.js
